title: cordia protracta
intro: Cordia protracta, also known as the Mexican Cordia or Bejuco de Flor, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cordia protracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Cordia protracta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its flowers can also be used to make a fragrant essential oil.
